refMeta.title: Tailwind CSS Textareas - Official Tailwind UI Components
refMeta.bodyText:
Introducing Oatmeal
Our new multi-theme marketing site kit

Templates

Sign in
Get full access
UI Blocks
Application UI

Textareas

Use these Tailwind CSS textarea components to add text input areas for things like user comments, feedback forms, and message boxes. These textarea components are designed and built by the Tailwind CSS team, and include a variety of different styles and layouts.

Simple

Preview

PLUS / UI BLOCKS / APPLICATION UI / FORMS / TEXTAREAS

Textareas

메모, 설명, 문의처럼 여러 줄 입력이 필요한 값을 다루는 폼 패턴입니다.

Tailwind Plus처럼 각 leaf의 첫 예제는 Preview와 Code를 함께 제공하고, 이후 예제는 Preview와 잠금 code CTA로 구분합니다. 우리 예시는 실제 화면 맥락에 맞춘 설명, tags, interaction feedback을 함께 보여줍니다.

ON THIS PAGE

5 examples
Simple
With avatar and actions
With underline and actions
With title and pill actions
With preview button
